scripts.dev:docker: docker compose up -d --build && until curl -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:3000; do echo 'Waiting for studio-web (port 3000)...'; sleep 2; done && turbo run dev --filter=@sven-studio/desktop --parallel
scripts.dev:back: pnpm dev:api & pnpm dev:admin-api & pnpm dev:community-backend & pnpm dev:crawler & pnpm dev:stats
scripts.dev:studio:all: pnpm dev:api & pnpm dev:studio & pnpm --dir studio/desktop dev
scripts.dev:api: cd studio/backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.dev:admin-api: cd backend/admin-backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.dev:community-backend: cd backend/community-backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.dev:crawler: cd backend/crawler && uv run python run.py
scripts.dev:stats: cd backend/stats-service && uv run python run.py
scripts.dev:stop: lsof -i :3000 -i :3001 -i :3002 -i :5174 -i :8000 -i :8001 -i :8002 -i :50051 -i :9100 -t | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'All dev services stopped.'
